entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The legume species Cicer arietinum used in the study of root nodulation

entities.name: NODULATION
entities.description: The process of forming root nodules in legumes through symbiosis with bacteria

entities.name: NON-NODULATION
entities.description: The genetic phenotype where a plant fails to form root nodules

entities.name: LEGUME-RHIZOBIUM SYMBIOSIS
entities.description: The biological interaction between legume plants and rhizobial bacteria

entities.name: RHIZOBIUM
entities.description: Soil bacteria that form symbiotic relationships with legumes to fix nitrogen

entities.name: CHI-SQUARE TEST
entities.description: A statistical method used to test genetic hypotheses of inheritance

entities.name: MONOGENIC INHERITANCE
entities.description: A pattern of inheritance where a trait is controlled by a single gene

entities.name: DIGENIC INHERITANCE
entities.description: A pattern of inheritance where a trait is controlled by two genes

entities.name: RECESSIVE GENE ACTION
entities.description: A genetic mechanism where a trait is expressed only when two copies of a recessive allele are present

entities.name: RN8
entities.description: A specific gene locus identified as controlling the non-nodulating phenotype in kabuli chickpea

entities.name: GREENHOUSE
entities.description: The controlled environment where the plant crosses and nodulation were tested

entities.name: KABULI CHICKPEA
entities.description: A specific variety of chickpea characterized by larger, lighter seeds

entities.name: DESI CHICKPEA
entities.description: A specific variety of chickpea characterized by smaller, darker seeds

relationships.description: is the site of testing for
